gotys.title: Grand Theft Auto V
gotys.summary: Grand Theft Auto V is a 2013 action-adventure game developed by Rockstar North and published by Rockstar Games. It is the first main entry in the Grand Theft Auto series since 2008's Grand Theft Auto IV.

gotys.title: Destiny
gotys.summary: Destiny is an online-only multiplayer first-person shooter video game developed by Bungie and self-published by Bungie after separating from Activision in 2019.

gotys.title: The Witcher 3
gotys.summary: The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt is a 2015 action role-playing game developed and published by CD Projekt and based on The Witcher series of fantasy novels by Andrzej Sapkowski. It is the sequel to the 2011 game The Witcher 2: Assassins of Kings, played in an open world with a third-person perspective.

gotys.title: Inside
gotys.summary: Inside is a puzzle-platformer adventure game developed and published by Playdead in 2016 for PlayStation 4, Xbox One and Microsoft Windows. The game was released for iOS in December 2017 and Nintendo Switch in June 2018. The player controls a boy in a dystopic world, solving environmental puzzles and avoiding death.

gotys.title: Hellblade: Senua's Sacrifice
gotys.summary: The story of Hellblade is based on Celtic and Norse mythology and follows the story of a Pict warrior named Senua as she embarks on a very personal journey through a hellish underworld.

gotys.title: God of War
gotys.summary: God of War is the eighth installment in the franchise overall. Unlike previous installments, this game focuses on Norse mythology and follows an older and more seasoned Kratos and his new son Atreus in the years since God of War III.

gotys.title: The Outer Worlds
gotys.summary: The Outer Worlds is an action role-playing game developed by Obsidian Entertainment and published by Private Division.
